# SonicForge

> Build, deploy, and manage your own Highrise music bot in minutes — no coding required.

SonicForge is a hosted platform that lets users spin up custom music bots for the Highrise virtual world. Users connect their Highrise account, configure their Icecast radio stream, and deploy a fully managed bot through a guided wizard.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and pricing teaser.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Create an account or log in.
